## Robbins LLP Solicits Photronics Investors to Lead Securities Class Action

Two independent sources covering a PLAB class action on the same day increases the credibility and market-awareness of the legal risk; lead-plaintiff solicitation typically precedes a consolidated filing, suggesting the process is advancing.

- Law firm Robbins LLP is actively soliciting PLAB investors with significant losses to serve as lead plaintiffs.
- Active law-firm solicitation confirms the class action is in progress, not merely threatened.
- Second outlet coverage amplifies the legal risk signal established in cluster 5d35a91be6dc57dc.
- No details on alleged wrongdoing, class period, or damages mentioned in the headline.
